summary: Iteration 143 - Konekt B2B Vendor Release + Margin + Sales Service Workflow Pack. All 21 features tested and verified: Vendor capability governance (CRUD + can-create check), Payment release policies (CRUD + check-release with full/partial/manual), Vendor orders visibility filter (excludes unreleased work, no selling_price/margin), Sales service workflow (customer invite, service quotes with 20% auto-margin, quote→invoice), Account activation (token validation + password set + login), Default 20% margin rule, Partner notification bell in top-right topbar.

minor.issue: Fixed: Account activation was not setting is_active=True, causing login to fail. Added is_active=True to activation update.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. vendor-demo-001 profile exists with products=approved, services=pending. Global payment release policy exists (full_upfront, after_full_payment). Global 20% margin rule exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from vendor_release_margin_sales_workflow_pack verified. Key endpoints: /api/admin/vendor-capabilities (CRUD + can-create), /api/admin/payment-release-policies (CRUD + check-release), /api/vendor/orders (excludes unreleased work), /api/sales/customers/create-with-invite, /api/sales/service-quotes (auto 20% margin), /api/auth/activate/validate + /api/auth/activate. Partner notification bell is in PartnerAccountTopbar (top-right), not sidebar. Email sending is MOCKED (logged to email_logs collection).

F1_vendor_capability_governance.details: POST /api/admin/vendor-capabilities creates vendor profile with capability statuses. GET /{id}/can-create?listing_type=product returns allowed:true for approved, allowed:false for pending.

F2_payment_release_policies.details: POST /api/admin/payment-release-policies creates release policy. POST /check-release returns can_release:true for full payment, can_release:false for partial, can_release:true for manual_release:true.

F3_vendor_orders_visibility.details: GET /api/vendor/orders excludes unreleased statuses (pending_payment, under_review, etc). Vendor order items only show vendor_price, not selling_price or margin.

F4_sales_customer_invite.details: POST /api/sales/customers/create-with-invite creates customer + invite token. Returns invite_url for activation.

F5_service_quote_auto_margin.details: POST /api/sales/service-quotes with vendor_cost=1000 returns selling_price=1200 (20% margin auto-applied). margin_applied_automatically=true.

F6_quote_to_invoice.details: POST /api/sales/service-quotes/{id}/accept creates invoice automatically with payment_terms (advance + final phases).

F7_account_activation.details: GET /api/auth/activate/validate validates token. POST /api/auth/activate sets password and activates account. Activated customer can login.

F8_default_margin_rule.details: Global 20% margin rule exists in margin_rules collection (scope=global, method=percentage, value=20, active=true).

F9_partner_notification_bell.details: Notification bell is in PartnerAccountTopbar (top-right), not in sidebar. Verified via Playwright test.

F10_activation_page_ui.details: Account activation page at /activate-account renders correctly. Shows error for invalid token, has password fields and submit button.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
